English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Department of Design and Environmental Analysis records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Design & Environmental Analysis
Cady, Helen J.
New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Housing and Design
23-16-1472
4.3 cubic feet.
1947-2007 Syllabi, course materials, reports, drawings. Oversize drawings from Professor Helen J. Cady's interior design classes in the Department of Design and Environmental Analysis at Cornell University. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 4 5 6 7 3 8 9 ======= 4 5 6 7 3 8 9 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2072693
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Staff
Date completed:
June 21, 2003
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, August 2003Daniel W. Young, March 2010
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, July 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The Department of Design and Environmental Analysis was formerly known as the Department of Housing and Design.
RELATED MATERIAL
Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.library.cornell.edu/handle/1813/11836
SERIES LIST
Series I. Reports; Faculty Annual Reports Box 1; Box 2; Box 4- Folders: 15,17; Box 6- Folders: 5; Box 7- Folders: 1-51
Series II. Printed Material Box 2; Box 4- Folders: 1-6; Box 6- Folder: 5
Series III. Course Material - Syllabi Box 3- Folders: 1-40; Box 4- Folders: 6-11; Box 6- Folders: 3; Box 7- Folders: 2-8
Series IV. Department Reviews/Accreditation Box 3- Folder: 31; Box 4- Folders: 12-14; Box 7- Folder: 1
Series V. Videotapes, Slides, Films Box 6- Folders: 4
Series VI. Subject Files Box 4- Folders: 16; Box 6- Folders: 2, 6-9
Series VII. Conferences Box 6- Folders: 1
Preferred Citation
See also College of Human Ecology records, #23-2-2817. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cite As:
Department of Design and Environmental Analysis records, #23-16-1472. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Oversize drawings from Professor Helen J. Cady's interior design classes in the Department of Design and Environmental Analysis at Cornell University.
Scope and content
Also faculty annual reports and reports for the Department of Housing and Design (1947-1962), newsletters (1949-1958), plans (1963-1965) , course syllabi (1976-2002), flammability films (1967-1970s), and videotapes.
Motion pictures (visual works). Videotapes. Drawings. Interior decoration -- Study and teaching. Interior architecture -- Study and teaching. Cornell University -- : Faculty.

Related Materials
Syllabi from 2009-2015 can be found in CUL's digital repository, eCommons.Professor Helen Cady's 325 and 326 three-five week interior design course - includes lighting study unit projects by students Nancy Williams, Ruth Morgan, Zipporah Stambler and S.
